---
ID: US-O12
Title: Inventory Receipt Artifact Save, Download, Link, Delete
Status: Code Present
Verified: true
Backdated: 2026-04-24
---

As an inventory operator  
I want receipt artifacts saved on device records with download/link/delete controls  
So receipt evidence (including Best Buy receipts) stays accessible from inventory detail.

Acceptance Criteria:
- [x] Device detail shows receipt artifacts count and list.
- [x] Receipt artifacts can be added by URL link.
- [x] Receipt artifacts can be added by file upload and reopened/downloaded.
- [x] Receipt artifact deletion requires confirmation.
- [x] Receipt artifact metadata persists as part of the device record update path.
- [x] Receipt links/files (including Best Buy receipts) are accessible directly from inventory device detail.
- [x] Receipt artifact timestamps render newest-first so current receipts are easiest to access.
- [x] Data export includes receipt artifact metadata because receipt assets are persisted with device records.
